doc_title_en: Correction to 'Initiatives Toward Realization of Management Conscious of Cost of Capital and Stock Price'

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本コストや株価を意識した経営

summary_en: Correction notice to May 13 disclosure on cost-of-capital and stock-price conscious management. Amended risk-free rate definition (10-year JGB compounded yield as of March 31, 2026) and dividend/DOE chart unit from yen to million yen. Specific COC targets not detailed in this correction.
summary_jp: 5月13日開示の資本コスト・株価意識経営に関する一部訂正。リスクフリーレート定義（2026年3月31日新発10年国債複利終値）および配当・DOEグラフの単位を円から百万円に修正。
tag_en: COC policy - DOE target not yet disclosed in correction notice
tag_jp: 資本コスト意識経営 - DOE目標は訂正通知では未開示
